sub.title: Subscription URL
sub.intro: Import this URL into a supported client. Resetting credentials immediately invalidates the old URL.
sub.qr_hint: Scan the QR code on the left from your mobile client to import directly.
sub.masked_hint: Subscription URL is hidden — tap 👁 to reveal both URL and QR. The copy button works without revealing.
sub.reset_warn: Resetting credentials immediately invalidates the old subscription URL and forces all connections to drop. Continue?

passkey.title: Passkeys
passkey.intro: Passkeys let you sign in with your device's fingerprint/face or a security key — no password to remember, and phishing-resistant. Once added, you can sign in from the login page with one tap.
passkey.confirm_delete_message: Delete "{{name}}"? That device will no longer be able to sign in with it.
passkey.add_failed: Could not add the passkey. Please try again.
passkey.rename_failed: Could not rename. Please try again.
passkey.delete_failed: Could not delete. Please try again.

twofa.title: Two-factor authentication (2FA)
twofa.intro: Once enabled, signing in requires a one-time code from an authenticator app (e.g. Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy) in addition to your password, greatly improving account security.
twofa.scan_hint: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app:
twofa.manual_hint: Can't scan? Enter this key manually:
twofa.generic_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
twofa.recovery_warning: Save these recovery codes somewhere safe — each can be used once to sign in if you lose your authenticator. They won't be shown again after you close this page.
twofa.disable_hint: Enter a current code or one of your recovery codes to turn off two-factor authentication.
twofa.disable_code_hint: An authenticator code or a recovery code both work.

rules.title: My personal rules
rules.placeholder:
- DOMAIN-SUFFIX,openai.com,🚀 节点选择
- DOMAIN-KEYWORD,github,🚀 节点选择
- IP-CIDR,10.0.0.0/8,🎯 全球直连
- MATCH,🐟 漏网之鱼
rules.hint: One rule per line, Clash / Mihomo syntax. In the default template, personal rules take priority over the site ruleset.
rules.disabled_toast: Personal rules editing is disabled by admin

emergency.title: Emergency access
emergency.intro: After expiry or traffic limit exceeded, emergency access can temporarily restore connection for {{hours}} hour(s) ({{remaining}} remaining).
emergency.status_available: After expiry or traffic limit exceeded, this can temporarily restore connection for {{hours}} hour(s).
emergency.status_no_quota: Emergency access has no remaining uses.
emergency.status_not_eligible: Your account has not expired and has not exceeded its traffic limit yet.
emergency.status_invalid_settings: Emergency access settings are incomplete. Contact an administrator.
emergency.status_unavailable: Emergency access is not available right now.
emergency.traffic_quota_hint: Each window allows up to {{total}} of traffic
emergency.no_quota: Emergency access has no remaining uses

import.title: Import to client
import.intro: Pick your client and tap Import — it'll auto-configure via URL Scheme. Tap Install if you don't have the client yet.
